title: [minor] fix duplicate test name
body:
copy/paste error in #14501.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Copy/paste code usually makes for lots more errors. I have not reviewed the code itself, only the pasted test name. There may be logic bugs in the test itself, and I encourage @containers/podman-maintainers to look for those.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cdoern*, *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Oh, no worries - we've all done it. It's just that with copy/paste, you paste and have to change this-and-that, and sometimes miss one of the things that need to be changed. That's why my encouragement to re-review.
